raw.message: Start playing now - get free puzzles every day!

hook.summary: Hand dragging puzzle pieces onto a digital board.
hook.visual_action: A person's hands hold a smartphone and drag a blue sky puzzle piece into the corner of a grey grid.

scene_flow: Close-up of a user starting a jigsaw puzzle on a smartphone.
Animated sequence of puzzle pieces snapping into place on a grey background.
The user completes the puzzle on the phone screen, revealing a scenic river town.
A gallery of diverse puzzle categories (animals, food, nature) scrolls into view.
Final branding screen with the title 'JIGSAW PUZZLES'.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle enthusiasts and adults looking for a relaxing, low-stress mobile gaming experience.
